nasb.text: For what comeliness and beauty will be theirs! Grain will make the young men flourish, and new wine the virgins.

esv.text: For how great is his goodness, and how great his beauty! Grain shall make the young men flourish, and new wine the young women.

cnv.text: 他們將是多麼的善，多麼的美； 五穀和新酒使少男少女生氣蓬勃。

ccb.text: 那将是何等的奇妙，何等的美好！ 五谷必滋养少男， 新酒必滋养少女。
